title: Project Scaffolding & Infrastructure Setup
description:
Bootstrap the full project structure as documented in architecture/technology-stack.md ¬ß8 (Project Structure). This is the foundation task every other task depends on.

What to create:

1. Root-level files:
   - `pyproject.toml` ‚Äî use the exact template from technology-stack.md ¬ß3.4 (Python 3.12, all runtime deps including fastapi, uvicorn, celery[redis], redis, httpx, pdfplumber, python-docx, python-magic, pyyaml, python-dotenv, structlog, aiofiles, mcp, python-multipart, pydantic, pydantic-settings)
   - `.env.example` ‚Äî use the full template from technology-stack.md ¬ß10
   - `.gitignore` ‚Äî include: .env, __pycache__, .venv, *.pyc, /tmp/uploads, uv.lock, node_modules, frontend/dist
   - `docker-compose.yml` ‚Äî use the exact template from technology-stack.md ¬ß9 (services: redis, backend, worker, frontend, flower with monitoring profile)
   - `Dockerfile.backend` ‚Äî use the exact template from technology-stack.md ¬ß9

2. Backend directory tree (empty __init__.py files + stub files):
   - `app/__init__.py`
   - `app/main.py` ‚Äî FastAPI app stub with CORS middleware configured for http://localhost:5173, global exception handlers, and router registration
   - `app/config.py` ‚Äî full Settings class from technology-stack.md ¬ß10
   - `app/schemas.py` ‚Äî all Pydantic models from api-interfaces.md ¬ß6 (AnalysisStatus, ConfidenceLevel, ScoreBreakdown, SalaryEstimate, Explanation, AnalysisResult, AnalyzeResponse, JobStatusResponse, HealthResponse, ErrorResponse)
   - `app/celery_app.py` ‚Äî Celery app config with Redis broker, result backend, task autodiscovery
   - `app/pipeline.py` ‚Äî stub for run_analysis_pipeline() chain definition
   - `app/job_store.py` ‚Äî stub for Redis job state read/write
   - `app/mcp_client.py` ‚Äî stub for MCP client session
   - `app/routes/__init__.py`
   - `app/routes/analyze.py` ‚Äî stub route
   - `app/routes/jobs.py` ‚Äî stub route
   - `app/routes/health.py` ‚Äî stub route
   - `app/tasks/__init__.py`
   - `app/tasks/ingest_cv.py` ‚Äî stub
   - `app/tasks/extract_cv_structure.py` ‚Äî stub
   - `app/tasks/compute_score.py` ‚Äî stub
   - `app/tasks/estimate_salary.py` ‚Äî stub
   - `app/tasks/generate_explanation.py` ‚Äî stub
   - `app/tasks/assemble_output.py` ‚Äî stub
   - `app/llm/__init__.py`
   - `app/llm/client.py` ‚Äî stub
   - `app/llm/prompts.py` ‚Äî stub
   - `app/utils/__init__.py`
   - `app/utils/pdf_extractor.py` ‚Äî stub
   - `app/utils/docx_extractor.py` ‚Äî stub
   - `app/utils/pii_stripper.py` ‚Äî stub
   - `app/utils/file_validator.py` ‚Äî stub

3. Platy MCP server:
   - `platy_mcp/__init__.py`
   - `platy_mcp/server.py` ‚Äî FastMCP entry point from architecture.md ¬ß6.4
   - `platy_mcp/tools.py` ‚Äî stub @mcp.tool() definitions
   - `platy_mcp/data/salary_data.json` ‚Äî skeleton JSON array with 2-3 example entries matching the schema in architecture.md ¬ß6.2
   - `platy_mcp/data/roles.json` ‚Äî list of canonical role categories

4. Config files:
   - `config/scoring_weights.yaml` ‚Äî weights: experience: 30, skills: 30, education: 20, role_seniority: 20
   - `config/salary_bands.yaml` ‚Äî fallback bands with at least 4 role categories x 4 tiers (junior/mid/senior/lead) with realistic CZK ranges
   - `config/role_mappings.yaml` ‚Äî role title/skill keyword mappings as in architecture.md ¬ß6.6

5. Frontend scaffold:
   - `frontend/package.json` ‚Äî exact template from technology-stack.md ¬ß4.3
   - `frontend/vite.config.ts` ‚Äî exact template from technology-stack.md ¬ß4.4
   - `frontend/tailwind.config.ts` ‚Äî exact template from technology-stack.md ¬ß4.5
   - `frontend/tsconfig.json` ‚Äî standard React+TypeScript config
   - `frontend/index.html` ‚Äî minimal HTML with root div
   - `frontend/src/main.tsx` ‚Äî ReactDOM.createRoot with QueryClientProvider
   - `frontend/src/types/api.ts` ‚Äî full TypeScript types from api-interfaces.md ¬ß7
   - `frontend/src/api/client.ts` ‚Äî full typed API client from api-interfaces.md ¬ß8
   - `frontend/src/hooks/useAnalysis.ts` ‚Äî stub (polling hook from api-interfaces.md ¬ß5)
   - `frontend/src/pages/AnalyzerPage.tsx` ‚Äî stub
   - `frontend/src/components/UploadForm.tsx` ‚Äî stub
   - `frontend/src/components/ProgressTracker.tsx` ‚Äî stub
   - `frontend/src/components/ScoreGauge.tsx` ‚Äî stub
   - `frontend/src/components/SalaryRange.tsx` ‚Äî stub
   - `frontend/src/components/ExplanationPanel.tsx` ‚Äî stub
   - `frontend/src/components/ErrorBanner.tsx` ‚Äî stub
   - `frontend/src/test/setup.ts` ‚Äî vitest setup

6. Tests directory:
   - `tests/__init__.py`
   - `tests/conftest.py` ‚Äî stub (shared fixtures)
   - `tests/unit/` ‚Äî empty dir with __init__.py
   - `tests/integration/` ‚Äî empty dir with __init__.py

Acceptance criteria:
- Running `ls app/ platy_mcp/ config/ frontend/src/ tests/` shows all expected directories
- `app/schemas.py` contains all Pydantic models with validators exactly as specified
- `frontend/src/types/api.ts` contains all TypeScript types matching the Pydantic models
- `frontend/src/api/client.ts` is the full typed client (not a stub)
- `docker-compose.yml` has all 5 services (redis, backend, worker, frontend, flower)
- `config/scoring_weights.yaml` has weights summing to 100
- `config/salary_bands.yaml` has at least 16 entries (4 roles x 4 tiers)
- `pyproject.toml` lists all required dependencies with correct version constraints
